title: Fadcaer 4 Pcs Beach Spades for Kids, Sand Toys Set, Snow Shovel, Plastic Shovels With Handle for Pit, Party, Camping, Summer Activities
features: ♫Beach Spades Set: This beach shovel set includes 4 randomly colored shovels, which can add a touch of brightness to game time and ensure that your child has a happy mood.

♫Premium Material: Crafted from high-quality plastic, these beach spades boast a robust construction that stands up to the rigors of play. Built to last, they are durable and resilient, promising hours of entertainment under the sun or in the snow.

♫Easy to Assemble and Store: The spades are designed for hassle-free assembly and disassembly, making them a breeze to store. Perfect for on-the-go fun, whether it's a day at the beach or a snowy adventure, these spades are always ready for action.

♫Suitable Size: These children's shovel sets have a smooth surface and a length of 40 centimeters, making them perfect for scooping sand or snow for children, but not for extremely compacted soil. With our children's shovels, you can enhance your child's beach adventure experience.

♫Widely Use: When your child uses a beach spade to move sand and snow or create imaginative objects, it can enhance cognitive development and motor skills. This is an ideal gift, suitable for school, party, beach outings, snow playing, stress relief, etc., making it an ideal summer or winter toy for fun adventures.
